# provider_mirror

*This page will be auto-generated by stardoc.*

Create filesystem mirrors for providers.

```starlark
load("@rules_tf2//tf2:def.bzl", "provider_mirror")

provider_mirror(
    name = "custom_mirror",
    providers = [
        "hashicorp/aws:5.0.0",
        "hashicorp/random:3.0.0",
    ],
)
```

See [Providers Overview](README.md) for more information.
